_comment: UI light number -> Bluetooth-mesh element address. UI light# = row*5 + col + 1 (5 columns). Two UI numbers sharing one address (e.g. 7 & 8 = 62, 27 & 28 = 48) are the same physical fixture and switch together. Light 18 is omitted because its element address is unknown; it is left permanently ON manually. Edit this file (no code change) if fixtures are rewired.
